content:
I've been playing Morimens for around 60 days now. Here are some guides to things I wish I knew sooner.

Note: they look better on a computer than phone.

**Very Beginner Navigation Guide and First Team**

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1KfZ4o6Mx-sVTZh_mHRAz7Zq4h44O6YBnxtaVQ2Y-eeo/edit?usp=sharing
